form.formComment: Well supported last time and rocketed out of the boxes with a strong early sectional, going on to clock 17.28 in a 6 length win at this track over 300m. Unbeaten in three starts from this box. Key runner.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Well supported last time and rocketed out of the boxes with a strong early sectional, going on to clock 17.28 in a 6 length win at this track over 300m. Unbeaten in three starts from this box. Key runner.

form.formComment: Last start winner at this track over this distance running a time of 17.97. Can make it two on the bounce.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start winner at this track over this distance running a time of 17.97. Can make it two on the bounce.

form.formComment: Good effort at double-figure odds last time when third (17.66) over 300m at this track. Drawn close to the inside. Solid top-three prospects.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort at double-figure odds last time when third (17.66) over 300m at this track. Drawn close to the inside. Solid top-three prospects.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened for racing room in the back straight and lost ground.

form.formComment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and tends to spot them a start in his races, The latest effort was a 11 length eighth over 300m at this track. Would be better placed in something easier.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and tends to spot them a start in his races, The latest effort was a 11 length eighth over 300m at this track. Would be better placed in something easier.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Was awkwardly placed on heels and lost ground entering the first turn.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage seventh last time out over 300m at this track. Likely to find this too tough.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage seventh last time out over 300m at this track. Likely to find this too tough.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Contacted rounding the home turn and fell as a result.
Tightened, checked and fell approaching the turn out of the front straight.

form.formComment: Good effort at double-figure odds last time when third (17.67) over 300m at this track. Looks tested in this line-up.

form.formComment: Quickly out of the boxes with a slick early sectional clocking 17.54 with a one length win at this track over 300m. Makes plenty of appeal. Go close again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Quickly out of the boxes with a slick early sectional clocking 17.54 with a one length win at this track over 300m. Makes plenty of appeal. Go close again.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (17.87) when fourth over 300m at this track in a Grade 4/5. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and two minors. Can feature in the finish.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Whilst leading through the home turn, was contacted and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Showed good improvement when second behind Watch Her Win at this track last start over 300m (17.61). Likely to play a major role.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off the heels rounding the home turn.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage seventh last time out over 300m at this track. Not keen, needs to lift.

formComments.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage seventh last time out over 300m at this track. Not keen, needs to lift.
